subject: session date
fact: The events of this session took place on June 14th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: Jun 14th, 2026

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum is a Duergar found unconscious in a moss-covered chamber.
source_quote: found an unconscious Duergar named Thera Grabelthum

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum confessed to spying on Duergar operations for the Zhentarim Black Network.
source_quote: she confessed to spying on Duergar operations for the Zhentarim Black Network

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum turned invisible and fled into the darkness during the ambush.
source_quote: Thera turned invisible and fled into the darkness

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum was killed in the chaos of the fight.
source_quote: Thera was killed in the chaos

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz was found bound and tormented by Githyanki warriors in the Mind Flayer's lair.
source_quote: The party discovers Arrizz bound and tormented by Githyanki warriors

subject: Arrizz
fact: The party freed Arrizz and cured his demonic madness using a piece of magical mushroom.
source_quote: The party frees Arrizz and cures his demonic madness using a piece of magical mushroom

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz traveled alongside the party back to Sporedome.
source_quote: with Arrizz traveling alongside them one last time

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz told the party he hoped never to see them again but would expect them if he needed saving.
source_quote: he hoped never to see them again, but if he did, he was certain it would be because they were coming to save him

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought is a mad Mind Flayer found in the innermost sanctum.
source_quote: Rogue Thought — the mad Mind Flayer they had come to destroy

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought declared he had been waiting for the party for a very long time.
source_quote: declared that he had been waiting for them for a very long time

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought used ambient Faerzress energy to lash out at Bramgrim.
source_quote: Rogue Thought used the ambient Faerzress energy to lash out at Bramgrim

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought was visibly staggered by a powerful strike from the Owlbear.
source_quote: delivering a powerful strike that visibly staggered the ancient creature

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought severed his own tentacles and vanished in a flash of planar magic to escape to another dimension.
source_quote: he severed his own tentacles, dropped them to the ground, and vanished in a flash of planar magic, escaping to another dimension entirely

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought vowed that he and Graz'zt would have their revenge.
source_quote: both he and Graz'zt would have their revenge

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim was identified by Rogue Thought as the greatest magical threat.
source_quote: whom he had identified through his mind-reading as the greatest magical threat

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim summoned a storm of spectral guardians that scorched the warriors with holy energy.
source_quote: Bramgrim responded by summoning a storm of spectral guardians that scorched the warriors with holy energy

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim finished off the last surviving Githyanki warrior with a burst of necrotic energy.
source_quote: Bramgrim finished off the last surviving Githyanki warrior with a burst of necrotic energy

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim healed the injured and unconscious Owlbear after the combat ended.
source_quote: Bramgrim heals the injured and unconscious Owlbear after the combat ends

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas loosed precise and punishing arrows from across the chamber.
source_quote: Akritas loosed precise and punishing arrows from across the chamber

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas received a telepathic message from the Emerald Enclave.
source_quote: The evening ended with a telepathic message arriving for Akritas from the Emerald Enclave

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur unleashed a massive fireball that engulfed the Mind Flayer and nearly every Githyanki warrior.
source_quote: he unleashed a massive fireball that roared through the chamber and engulfed the Mind Flayer and nearly every Githyanki warrior in a single catastrophic explosion

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur received three bottles of rare wine as a personal gift from Isthana.
source_quote: three bottles of rare wine — a personal gift to Felkur

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur privately reflects on his secret past as the 'Phantom Thief'.
source_quote: Felkur privately reflects on his secret past as the 'Phantom Thief'

subject: Daein
fact: Daein delivered a relentless series of blows that drove the Mind Flayer to the very edge of destruction.
source_quote: Daein surged forward and delivered a relentless series of blows that drove the Mind Flayer to the very edge of destruction

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana is the city's powerful and influential criminal matriarch in Hillsfar.
source_quote: Isthana, the city's powerful and influential criminal matriarch

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana warned that any business without her support would find the city a very difficult place to operate.
source_quote: any venture without her support would find the city a very difficult place to operate

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv is a wizard leading the Drow resistance in Szith Morcane.
source_quote: link up with the Drow resistance led by the wizard Murssvayas Dhuurniv

subject: Zhentarim Black Network
fact: Thera Grabelthum was spying for the Zhentarim Black Network.
source_quote: confessed to spying on Duergar operations for the Zhentarim Black Network

subject: Githyanki
fact: Two Githyanki warriors burst from the muck in a sudden ambush.
source_quote: two Githyanki warriors burst from the muck in a sudden ambush

subject: Githyanki
fact: Four Githyanki warriors were flanking Rogue Thought in the final chamber.
source_quote: Flanking him were four Githyanki warriors

subject: Order of the Gauntlet
fact: The Mind Flayer promised to pass vital intelligence about Graz'zt's operations to the Order of the Gauntlet.
source_quote: promising to pass vital intelligence about Graz'zt's operations to the Order of the Gauntlet

subject: Emerald Enclave
fact: The Emerald Enclave sent a telepathic message warning of fire giants nearing completion of their work in Szith Morcane.
source_quote: The news was grave: fire giants controlling the Underdark city of Szith Morcane were nearing completion of their work

subject: Drow resistance
fact: The Drow resistance in Szith Morcane is led by the wizard Murssvayas Dhuurniv.
source_quote: link up with the Drow resistance led by the wizard Murssvayas Dhuurniv

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear was stunned and helpless by a psychic blast from an intellect devourer.
source_quote: left the Owlbear stunned and helpless

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear charged through the far door and crashed into Rogue Thought.
source_quote: The Owlbear charged through the far door and crashed into Rogue Thought himself

subject: intellect devourer
fact: An intellect devourer emerged from a slain Githyanki warrior's skull.
source_quote: a slain warrior's skull cracked open to reveal an intellect devourer

subject: intellect devourer
fact: The intellect devourer unleashed a devastating psychic blast.
source_quote: which unleashed a devastating psychic blast

subject: intellect devourer
fact: Felkur destroyed the intellect devourer with a firebolt.
source_quote: Felkur destroys the intellect devourer with a firebolt

subject: Githyanki warriors
fact: A Githyanki knight vanished using planar magic after warning the party they had made a permanent enemy.
source_quote: A Githyanki knight vanishes using planar magic after warning the party they have made a permanent enemy

subject: Githyanki warriors
fact: Two Githyanki warriors used their innate ability to teleport away from the spectral guardians.
source_quote: Two of the Githyanki warriors used their innate ability to teleport away from the spectral guardians

subject: Githyanki warriors
fact: The last surviving Githyanki warrior was finished off by Bramgrim.
source_quote: Bramgrim finished off the last surviving Githyanki warrior

subject: Rogue Mind Flayer's lair
fact: The party pressed onward through the rogue Mind Flayer's lair's twisted corridors.
source_quote: Deep within the rogue Mind Illayer's lair, the party pressed onward through its twisted corridors

subject: moss-covered chamber
fact: The party found an unconscious Duergar named Thera Grabelthum in a moss-covered chamber.
source_quote: uncovering a moss-covered chamber where they found an unconscious Duergar named Thera Grabelthum

subject: freezing chamber
fact: The party discovered a freezing chamber kept cold by towering columns of ice.
source_quote: They discovered a freezing chamber kept cold by towering columns of ice

subject: freezing chamber
fact: A massive block of opaque ice preserving suspended brains sat at the center of the freezing chamber.
source_quote: at the center of which sat a massive block of opaque ice preserving suspended brains

subject: innermost sanctum
fact: The party placed brains at sealed doors to unlock the path to the Mind Flayer's innermost sanctum.
source_quote: unlocking the path to the Mind Illayer's innermost sanctum

subject: final chamber
fact: The final chamber's walls were festooned with graven images of skulls and brains.
source_quote: its walls festooned with graven images of skulls and brains of every size

subject: final chamber
fact: The acoustics of the final chamber were so sharp that even the faintest whisper rang out clearly.
source_quote: the acoustics were so sharp that even the faintest whisper rang out clearly across the hard surfaces

subject: Sporedome
fact: The party made their way back to the fungal city of Sporedome.
source_quote: made their way back through the Underdark to Sporedome

subject: Hillsfar
fact: The party returned to Hillsfar on the surface.
source_quote: Back on the surface, the party returned to Hillsfar

subject: Szith Morcane
fact: Fire giants controlling the Underdark city of Szith Morcane were nearing completion of their work.
source_quote: fire giants controlling the Underdark city of Szith Morcane were nearing completion of their work

subject: Dalelands
fact: The fire giants in Szith Morcane had turned their eyes toward the Dalelands.
source_quote: had turned their eyes toward the surface — toward the Dalelands

subject: copper plate
fact: A hidden copper plate emblazoned with alien markings lay tucked within the freezing chamber.
source_quote: A hidden copper plate emblazoned with alien markings lay tucked within the room

subject: suspicious chest
fact: The party chose to leave a suspicious chest alone in the freezing chamber.
source_quote: a suspicious chest sat nearby — one the party wisely chose to leave alone

subject: brains
fact: The party collected brains and placed them at each of the sealed doors to gain entry.
source_quote: they placed the brains they had collected at each of the sealed doors

subject: decorative brain jars
fact: Three tall, decorative brain jars stood at the center of the final chamber.
source_quote: Three tall, decorative brain jars stood at the center of the room

subject: Rogue Thought's tentacles
fact: The party collected Rogue Thought's severed tentacles as proof of their victory.
source_quote: The party collected Rogue Thought's severed tentacles as proof of their victory

subject: rod of the pact keeper
fact: The Mind Flayer rewarded the party with a rod of the pact keeper.
source_quote: The Mind Illayer rewards the party with a rod of the pact keeper

subject: wand of the war mage
fact: The Mind Flayer rewarded the party with an upgraded wand of the war mage.
source_quote: and an upgraded wand of the war mage

subject: rare wine
fact: Isthana presented Felkur with three bottles of rare wine.
source_quote: three bottles of rare wine — a personal gift to Felkur

subject: opals
fact: The party found two opals while searching the area.
source_quote: finding two opals

subject: circlet
fact: The party found a valuable circlet while searching the area.
source_quote: a valuable circlet

subject: chainmail pouch of gold coins
fact: The party found a chainmail pouch of gold coins while searching the area.
source_quote: and a chainmail pouch of gold coins

subject: brain-capped mushrooms
fact: The brain-capped mushrooms the party had secured were holding back the worst of Graz'zt's madness.
source_quote: The brain-capped mushrooms the party had secured were holding back the worst of Graz'zt's madness

subject: Thera's confession
fact: Under pressure from the party's intimidation, Thera Grabelthum confessed to spying for the Zhentarim.
source_quote: Under the pressure of the party's intimidation, her story of being an innocent traveler quickly unraveled, and she confessed to spying on Duergar operations for the Zhentarim Black Network

subject: Githyanki ambush
fact: Two Githyanki warriors burst from the muck in a sudden ambush.
source_quote: two Githyanki warriors burst from the muck in a sudden ambush

subject: intellect devourer reveal
fact: A slain Githyanki warrior's skull cracked open to reveal an intellect devourer.
source_quote: a slain warrior's skull cracked open to reveal an intellect devourer

subject: Owlbear stunned
fact: The intellect devourer unleashed a psychic blast that left the Owlbear stunned and helpless.
source_quote: which unleashed a devastating psychic blast that left the Owlbear stunned and helpless

subject: intellect devourer destroyed
fact: The party destroyed the intellect devourer after a fierce struggle.
source_quote: after a fierce struggle, the creature was destroyed

subject: Thera's death
fact: Thera Grabelthum was killed in the chaos of the fight.
source_quote: Thera was killed in the chaos

subject: Owlbear healed
fact: The Owlbear was healed after the ambush.
source_quote: With the ambush behind them and the Owlbear healed

subject: chamber entry
fact: The party placed brains at each of the sealed doors to unlock the path to the innermost sanctum.
source_quote: they placed the brains they had collected at each of the sealed doors, unlocking the path to the Mind Illayer's innermost sanctum

subject: Rogue Thought's greeting
fact: Rogue Thought declared he had been waiting for the party for a very long time.
source_quote: declared that he had been waiting for them for a very long time

subject: final battle start
fact: The battle erupted immediately when the party entered the final chamber.
source_quote: The battle erupted immediately

subject: Githyanki charge
fact: The Githyanki warriors charged with their greatswords.
source_quote: The Githyanki warriors charged with their greatswords

subject: Bramgrim summons guardians
fact: Bramgrim summoned a storm of spectral guardians that scorched the warriors with holy energy.
source_quote: Bramgrim responded by summoning a storm of spectral guardians that scorched the warriors with holy energy

subject: Githyanki teleport
fact: Two Githyanki warriors used their innate ability to teleport away from the spectral guardians.
source_quote: Two of the Githyanki warriors used their innate ability to teleport away from the spectral guardians

subject: Owlbear strikes Rogue Thought
fact: The Owlbear charged through the far door and crashed into Rogue Thought, delivering a powerful strike.
source_quote: The Owlbear charged through the far door and crashed into Rogue Thought himself, delivering a powerful strike

subject: Felkur's fireball
fact: Felkur unleashed a massive fireball that engulfed the Mind Flayer and nearly every Githyanki warrior.
source_quote: he unleashed a massive fireball that roared through the chamber and engulfed the Mind Illayer and nearly every Githyanki warrior in a single catastrophic explosion

subject: Daein's assault
fact: Daein delivered a relentless series of blows that drove the Mind Flayer to the very edge of destruction.
source_quote: Daein surged forward and delivered a relentless series of blows that drove the Mind Illayer to the very edge of destruction

subject: Rogue Thought's escape
fact: Rogue Thought severed his own tentacles and vanished in a flash of planar magic to escape to another dimension.
source_quote: he severed his own tentacles, dropped them to the ground, and vanished in a flash of planar magic, escaping to another dimension entirely

subject: last Githyanki killed
fact: Bramgrim finished off the last surviving Githyanki warrior with a burst of necrotic energy.
source_quote: Bramgrim finished off the last surviving Githyanki warrior with a burst of necrotic energy

subject: Arrizz's farewell
fact: Arrizz paused at the edge of Sporedome and offered his farewell to the party.
source_quote: At the edge of the fungal city, the dry-witted drow paused and offered his farewell

subject: reward received
fact: The Mind Flayer who hired them rewarded the party with powerful magical gifts.
source_quote: The Mind Illayer who had hired them received the tentacles without ceremony and rewarded the party with powerful magical gifts

subject: dinner with Isthana
fact: The party was invited to a private dinner by Isthana in Hillsfar.
source_quote: were promptly invited to a private dinner by Isthana

subject: business proposal
fact: The party floated the idea of starting a business in Hillsfar to Isthana.
source_quote: she listened with great interest as the party floated the idea of starting a business in the city

subject: Isthana's threat
fact: Isthana warned that any business without her support would find the city a very difficult place to operate.
source_quote: any venture without her support would find the city a very difficult place to operate

subject: Emerald Enclave message
fact: A telepathic message arrived for Akritas from the Emerald Enclave.
source_quote: The evening ended with a telepathic message arriving for Akritas from the Emerald Enclave

subject: fire giant threat
fact: The message warned that fire giants in Szith Morcane were nearing completion of their work and had turned their eyes toward the surface.
source_quote: The news was grave: fire giants controlling the Underdark city of Szith Morcane were nearing completion of their work and had turned their eyes toward the surface

subject: Graz'zt's revenge
fact: Rogue Thought vowed that he and Graz'zt would have their revenge.
source_quote: both he and Graz'zt would have their revenge

subject: Graz'zt's corruption
fact: The party was tasked with stopping the spread of Graz'zt's corruption upon the surface world.
source_quote: stop the giants before they could unleash Graz'zt's corruption upon the surface world

subject: future business in Hillsfar
fact: The door remained open for future business arrangements with Isthana.
source_quote: though the door remained open for future arrangements

subject: fire giant invasion
fact: The next great battle is coming and will be fought in the dark heart of the Underdark to stop the fire giants.
source_quote: The next great battle was coming, and it would be fought in the dark heart of the Underdark
